caption: Detection
description: The Detection object describes the characteristics, techniques and content for the determination of a security violation, compromise, or breach.
name: detection

detection_pattern.description: The specific detection pattern or signature associated with the indicator.

detection_system.description: The technology or sensor layer that reported or originated the detection, normalized to the caption of detection_system_id. When detection_system_id is 99 (Other), this attribute must contain the source-specific label.

detection_system_id.description: The normalized identifier of the technology or sensor layer that was involved in, or reported, or originated the detection. Use this to classify the detection surface (e.g., IPS sensor, endpoint agent, email gateway). When the type is not listed, use 99 (Other) and populate detection_system with the source-specific label.

1.caption: Network
1.description: The detection is reported by, or originates from a network, firewall, or IPS sensor.

2.caption: Endpoint
2.description: The detection is reported by, or originates from an endpoint device.

3.caption: Email
3.description: The detection is reported by, or originates from an email gateway or email security system.

4.caption: IAM
4.description: The detection is reported by, or originates from an identity and access management (IAM) system or service.

5.caption: Proxy
5.description: The detection is reported by, or originates from a proxy server (e.g., forward or reverse proxy, web gateway).

6.caption: Threat Intel
6.description: The detection is reported by a cyber threat intelligence (CTI) system or by matching observables against a threat intelligence feed or report.

7.caption: Application
7.description: The detection is reported by, or originates from an application (e.g., web application, SaaS platform, or custom business application).

policy.description: Details about the policy that triggered the detection.
